title: Material Index File
description: Schema for index/<source>.json files. Each file is an array of material entries from a single upstream source.

id.description: Unique identifier within the source, e.g. "Metal064", "rusty_metal". Must be unique per source file.

name.description: Human-readable display name, e.g. "Brushed Stainless Steel".

tags.description: Freeform tags from the upstream source. May be empty.

color_hex.description: Representative color as a hex string, e.g. "#A0522D". Null if not available.

roughness.description: Roughness value in the range [0.0, 1.0]. Null if not available.

metalness.description: Metalness value in the range [0.0, 1.0]. Null if not available.

ior.description: Index of refraction. Null if not available. Typical range 1.0-3.0 but not constrained.

source_url.description: URL to the material's page on the upstream source.

source_mtlx_url.description: Direct URL to the upstream .mtlx file, if one is available. Null otherwise.

source_license.description: SPDX license identifier for this material, e.g. "CC0-1.0", "Apache-2.0".

available_tiers.description: Resolution tiers available for this material.

maps.description: Texture map channels available for this material.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the upstream source last changed this material.

status.description: Bake status. Present only when bake failed.
